title: Furnished Studio Near Cocles Beach
summary: Furnished studio apartment, 5min walk to Cocles beach. WiFi, AC, shared pool. Available August 1.

title: 7'6" Fish Surfboard — Lost Brand
summary: Lost RNF 7'6" fish. Good condition, some dings repaired. EPS/epoxy. Comes with fins.

title: Surf Instructor for July — Busy Season
summary: Looking for an experienced surf instructor for July-August. Must speak English and Spanish. 5+ years experience preferred.

title: Cashier — Old Harbour Supermarket
summary: Part-time cashier position. 4 days/week, morning shift. Must speak Spanish. Previous cashier experience required.

title: Private Salsa & Bachata Lessons
summary: Professional dance instructor offering private salsa and bachata lessons. Single or couples. All levels welcome. At your place or mine.

title: Full Moon Party — Playa Cocles
summary: Monthly full moon party at Playa Cocles. Fire dancers, DJs, bonfire. BYOB. Starts at sunset on July 15.

title: Ride to San José — July 20 Morning
summary: Driving to San José on July 20, leaving 7am from Puerto Viejo center. 3 seats available. AC, safe driving. Drop-off anywhere in SJ.

title: Lost: Black Osprey Backpack — Playa Negra
summary: Lost a black Osprey Farpoint 40 at Playa Negra on July 5. Has a red carabiner on the front zipper. Reward for return.

title: Mountain Bike for Sale — Trek Marlin 5
summary: Trek Marlin 5, size M. 1 year old, well maintained. Disc brakes, 21 speed. Great for Punta Uva trails.

title: Roommate Wanted — 2BR House
summary: Looking for a roommate for a 2BR house near Salsa Brava. Shared kitchen, living room, garden. WiFi included. Prefer quiet, clean person.

title: Certified Massage Therapist — House Calls
summary: Certified massage therapist offering Swedish, deep tissue, and hot stone massage. I come to your cabina or hotel. English and Spanish.

title: Weekly Pool Tournament — Selina
summary: Every Wednesday at 8pm at Selina Puerto Viejo. $5 entry, winner takes the pot. All levels welcome. Bar specials all night.

title: English Teacher — Weekend Classes
summary: Small community school in Gandoca needs an English teacher for Saturday morning classes. 2-3 hours/week. Teaching materials provided.

title: Found: GoPro Hero 12 — Cahuita National Park
summary: Found a GoPro Hero 12 on the Cahuita trail near the entrance. Sand inside but still works. Tell me what's on the SD card to claim.

title: Daily Rides Playa Negra → Punta Uva & Back
summary: I drive Playa Negra to Punta Uva every morning at 8am and return at 3pm. $3 per ride. Pickup anywhere along the main road.
